message:
feat(demo_showcase): color profile detection, jobs filtering, and theme system

Color Profile Detection (theme.rs):
- Add ColorProfile enum: Ascii, Ansi16, Ansi256, TrueColor
- Implement detect() with environment variable hierarchy:
  - NO_COLOR → Ascii
  - TERM=dumb → Ascii
  - COLORTERM=truecolor/24bit → TrueColor
  - TERM contains 256color → Ansi256
  - Default → Ansi16
- Support graceful degradation of styles based on profile
- Follow accessibility guidelines from ACCESSIBILITY.md

Jobs Page Filtering & Sorting (jobs.rs):
- Add StatusFilter struct for toggling Running/Completed/Failed/Queued
- Integrate TextInput for instant name/ID query filtering
- Implement O(1) filtered_indices for efficient row access
- Add column header click sorting and 's' key cycle
- Maintain table selection state across filter changes

Dashboard & UI Updates:
- Update app.rs with improved page routing
- Enhance sidebar.rs styling integration
- Extend simulation.rs with job status data
- Improve wizard.rs form flow
- Update test_support.rs for new theme API

These changes improve accessibility, usability, and maintainability
of the demo showcase application.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
